description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden wardrobe with a natural oak finish, featuring two upper doors with frosted glass panels and two lower solid wood doors. The upper section is likely intended for display or storage, with the glass allowing partial visibility of the contents inside. The lower section provides concealed storage, accessible via two smaller doors. Each door is equipped with a simple round knob handle, and the wardrobe stands on four short legs, giving it a slightly elevated stance. The wood grain is visible throughout, adding a textured, organic appearance. The overall design is functional and straightforward, suitable for both residential and urban utility spaces.
description: A tall, natural oak-finished wooden wardrobe with frosted glass upper doors and solid lower doors, featuring round knob handles and visible wood grain.
description_view_0: Front view showing two frosted glass upper doors, two solid lower doors, and four round knob handles.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the wardrobe's depth, flat wooden side panel, and the slight overhang of the top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wooden back panel with visible wood grain and no openings or handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with a flat wooden panel and top overhang.
